title: Two usage variations of --new flag added to e2e
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->
During the work on https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/9445 it was discussed that --new flag do not have e2e tests for all the variations.
Additionally, one if in wrong place and similar, newly implemented flags do not work in all cases. I think it is good to add these tests for the completeness, but also future reference (to see all the possible options for this type of flag).
